description: Applies data analysis to explore datasets, identify patterns, evaluate trends, and produce actionable business insight.
Applies data governance by improving data quality, defining standards, enforcing controls, and supporting trusted reporting.
Designs ETL processes to extract, transform, validate, and load data across systems in a controlled and scalable way.
Uses Power BI to build dashboards, model measures, create visuals, and communicate performance insights to stakeholders.
Supports programme delivery through planning, governance, milestone tracking, workstream coordination, and issue management.
Uses Python for scripting, automation, analysis, and technical problem solving across data and reporting workflows.
Supports regulatory reporting by preparing submissions, validating data, reconciling outputs, and meeting reporting obligations.
Applies risk controls through control design, testing, assurance, mitigation, and control effectiveness monitoring.
Uses SQL to query databases, join tables, transform data, optimize retrieval, and support reporting or analysis.
Manages stakeholders by gathering requirements, aligning expectations, communicating decisions, and coordinating cross-functional delivery.
